narrative:
Precinct Richland (precinct in Guernsey County) has 1,074 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points.
